title: Bundle
description: Top-level private bundle index installed beside the public vms.json manifest.

allocatorPath.description: Private local-root allocator metadata artifact path.

artifactHashes.description:
Per-artifact SHA-256 hashes for tamper detection of every private bundle artifact loaded by the resolver.

Keys match the path strings stored in the bundle path fields: absolute paths for `host_path`, `processes_path`, `privileges_path`, `storage_path`, `sync_path`, `allocator_path`, and `realm_controllers_path`; bundle-relative paths for `closures[*].path` and `minijail_profiles[*].path`. Values are `"sha256:<hex64>"` strings.

When `None`, per-artifact hash verification is skipped (backwards compatibility with bundles that pre-date this field).

bundleHash.description:
SHA-256 self-hash of the bundle JSON with `bundleHash` absent and `artifactHashes` nullified.

Emitted by `nixos-modules/bundle.nix` as `"sha256:<hex64>"`. The Rust loader verifies it by stripping `bundleHash`, setting `artifactHashes` to null, re-serialising with serde_json (sorted keys, no spaces), and comparing.  On `schemaVersion "v2"` bundles a missing field is a hard failure; on v1 it logs a warning.

bundleVersion.description: Version of the bundle format; bundleVersion 8 adds realm-controller metadata while artifact schemaVersion stays v2.

closures.description: Per-VM closure artifact paths keyed by VM name.

generation.description: Generation metadata for auditing drift between Nix output and runtime state.

managedKeys.description: Managed SSH key metadata used by the CLI/daemon key inventory surface.

minijailProfiles.description: Minijail profile metadata paths shipped with the bundle.

publicManifestPath.description: Public vms.json manifest path retained for v0.4.0 compatibility.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version directory used to validate all artifacts in this bundle.

BundleClosureRef.description: Reference to a per-VM closure artifact under closures/<vm>.json.

path.description: Bundle-relative path to the VM closure JSON.

vm.description: VM name whose closure metadata is described.

BundleGeneration.description: Generator identity and timestamps used by bundle drift gates.

generatedAt.description: Reproducible timestamp string supplied by the Nix emitter.

generator.description: Tool or module that emitted the bundle.

sourceRevision.description: Optional source revision or derivation identity.

BundleProfileRef.description: Reference to typed minijail profile metadata.

path.description: Bundle-relative path to the profile JSON.

profileId.description: Stable profile identifier used by processes.json roles.
